did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper focuses on pre-processing techniques (image processing, color space analysis, histogram generation) to remove irrelevant information from melanoma images. While it discusses AI, deep learning, and CNNs in the literature review and methodology as context or future applications, the actual results presented are based on traditional image processing statistics (RGB, HSV, LCH, LAB channel values) rather than AI/ML model training or inference.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
